title: Nature's Carpet - Wilder Flowers
description: A lush floral overhaul bringing colorful wildflowers to Minecraft’s forests with a natural, immersive feel.
body:
This texture pack transforms Minecraft’s forests with a vivid array of wildflowers, adding randomized color and shape variations across four growth stages. Designed to keep the game’s classic pixelated charm, it enhances natural biomes with vibrant, procedurally varied blooms that blend seamlessly into the world.
***

## **Support the work**

If you enjoy what I create, supporting the page helps me spend more time on updates, polishing features, fixing issues, and creating new content for future releases.

Every bit of support helps keep development going — thank you for making the next update possible.
